## Quality Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` — all tests pass
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] No `any` types (unless unavoidable with a comment)
- [ ] Error paths handled (try/catch or Result types)
- [ ] No debug logs, commented-out code, or TODOs
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`fix/`, `feat/`, `chore/`)
